notes: v1.8.4.83 - Smart PBR + Google Flow + License V3 Moi: - Smart PBR Auto-Load: keo texture PBR vao Material Tab -> tu dong load toan bo map cung bo (CGAxis, Poliigon, Megascans, ambientCG, Poly Haven) - Keo thu muc -> tu tim diffuse va load bo PBR, AI chi tao map con thieu - Keo thu muc vao I2A -> tu dong index toan bo (chon loai: Texture/Model/HDRI) - Google Flow Tab: tao anh/video AI ngay trong 3ds Max [Pro] - Ban quyen V3: he thong 2 khoa moi (HWID + Subscription) [Pro] - I2A: index texture trong archive .zip/.rar/.7z - I2A: chuot phai ket qua -> Tao Bitmap hoac Material Cai thien: - Tim kiem texture I2A nhanh hon 30 lan - AI-Assist phan hoi nhanh hon Sua loi: - Sua loi tao nhieu anh I2I tren may cham - Sua menu chuot phai I2A khong load duoc - Sua Flow Tab mat dang nhap sau restart
